nodes.name: Replay Entry
nodes.notes: Contract B replay entry. Replays the original health scan trigger with the same correlation_id.

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { key: p.idem_key, tenant_id: null, workflow: '09-health-churn-risk' } }];

const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: null, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'health', step: 'scan-risk', status: 'skipped', payload: { reason: 'duplicate scan', key: p.idem_key } } }];

const p = $('Normalize Run').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: null, correlation_id: p.correlation_id, service: 'health', step: 'scan-risk', status: 'started', payload: { source: p.replay ? 'replay' : 'scheduled-or-webhook', threshold: p.threshold, execution_id: p.execution_id } } }];

const n = $('Notify Telegram').first().json;
return [{ json: { tenant_id: null, correlation_id: n.correlation_id, service: 'health', step: 'route-playbook', status: 'success', payload: { risk_count: n.risk_count, risks: n.risks, telegram_delivered: n.alert_delivered, notice: n.notice } } }];
